titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 565

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=5 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:19:35.778742+00 | translation moa=6 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 20:19:35.793515+00

div.p: . Dauid . Rex Scottorum . Comitibus . Baronibus . Vicecomitibus . Ministris . et Omnibus fidelibus suis clericis . et laicis . totius terre sue  salutem . Sciatis me concessisse . et Dedisse Arnolfo isti meo militi totam terram de Swinton’ cum pecunia . et hominibus et Omnibus rebus Iuste ad eandem terram pertinentibus In feudo . et In Hereditate . sibi et heredibus ita libere . et quiete . et honorifice tenere . et habere . sicut Vdardus Vicecomes eam tenuit liberius . et quietius per illud seruitium inde faciendo monachis Dunhelme quod ipse Vdardus eis inde faciebat . presentibus testibus . Willelmo Nepote regis . et Madd’ Comite . et Dunecano Comite . et Hugone de Morvill’ . et Walt’ filio Alani . Apud . Trauercoir .

p.cl: David king of the Scots to earls, barons, sheriffs, officials and all his sworn men, clerk and lay, of his entire land, greeting.

Know me to have conceded, and given to Arnolf my knight, the whole land of Swinton, with cattle and men and all things rightfully belonging to it, in feu and heritage, for him and his heirs to hold and to have so freely and quitly and honourably as Udard the sheriff most freely and quitly held it, by performing that service upon it to the monks of Durham which Udard himself performed for them upon it.
Present as witnesses: William the king’s nephew; Matad the earl; Duncan the earl; Hugh de Morville; Walter son of Alan.
